# CWE-915: Improperly Controlled Modification of Dynamically-Determined Object Attributes (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-915-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
)

type Profile struct {
	ID      int    `json:"id"`
	Name    string `json:"name"`
	Role    string `json:"role"`
	Balance int    `json:"balance"`
}

var profiles = map[int]Profile{}

// Vulnerable: user-controlled map can update privileged fields such as role and balance.
func UpdateProfile(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	id := r.URL.Query().Get("id")
	var fields map[string]interface{}
	if err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&fields); err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "bad request", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	var pid int
	_ = json.Unmarshal([]byte(id), &pid)
	p := profiles[pid]
	raw, _ := json.Marshal(fields)
	_ = json.Unmarshal(raw, &p)
	profiles[pid] = p
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
